addPhysicalPassportDescription: Scan a plain NFC tag to register it with your account. Encrypted NTAG424 tags are factory-produced and claimed by scanning.
adminRegisterEncryptedTagDescription: Scan and register an NTAG424 SUN encrypted tag. This will generate a SUN key and configure the tag for secure authentication.
affiliationsDescription: Help advertise the Solar Network, and earn points!
aliasHint: Enter a nickname for this user
assignedUserIdDescription: If set, only this user can claim the tag. If empty, the first authenticated scanner will claim it.
authFactorExisted: You already added this type of factor.
authFactorPasskeyDescription: Use fingerprint or Face ID to authenticate.
authFactorPhysicalPassportDescription: Use an NFC tag as your authentication factor.
authFactorRecoveryCodeDescription: A fallback code for account recovery. Generate this first before setting up other factors.

authLogoutAllOtherSessionsHint: Are you sure you want to logout all other sessions? This action cannot be undone.
authorizedAppDeauthorizeHint: Are you sure you want to revoke access for this app? This app will no longer be able to access your account.

claimEncryptedTagDescription: Enter the UID of a factory-produced encrypted tag to claim it. The UID is usually printed on the tag.

permissionOverrideHint: Set specific permission overrides for this member. Leave as Default to use role-based permissions.
deleteRoleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
roleSystemGuideDescription:
Roles are integer values (0-100) with three built-in levels:
• Owner (100): Full control
• Moderator (50): Manage members, moderate content
• Member (0): Basic member

You can create custom roles between these levels (e.g., 25 for Helper, 75 for Senior Moderator).

Permission Check Flow:
1. User Permission Override (if exists)
2. → Role Permission (if defined for that role level)
3. → Default Permission (hardcoded for Owner/Moderator/Member)
roleLevelsDescription:
Roles are integer values (0-100) with three built-in levels:
• Owner (100): Full control
• Moderator (50): Manage members, moderate content
• Member (0): Basic member

You can create custom roles between these levels (e.g., 25 for Helper, 75 for Senior Moderator).

Current role: {roleName} (Level {roleLevel})
permissionOverrideGuideDescription:
Individual users can have permission overrides that take precedence over role-based permissions.

• Toggle ON: Override role permission (allow)
• Toggle OFF: Override role permission (deny)
• Toggle to DEFAULT: Use role-based permission

Permission Check Flow:
1. User Permission Override (if exists)
2. → Role Permission (if defined for that role level)
3. → Default Permission (hardcoded for Owner/Moderator/Member)
